---
title: "Digital Marketing"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

This page highlights my digital marketing projects, case studies, and dashboards. It is set up to automatically display the projects in my `posts/` folder, so I can keep this section updated by adding or editing project posts there.
